intro: Embark on a thrilling detective visual novel with your quirky assistant, Olivina, featuring unique investigations and a diverse cast of characters.
description:
Step into the life of a self-proclaimed detective. Along with your quirky assistant Olivina, take on a seemingly ordinary case, until you unravel its hidden twists and turns that pull you through a thrilling, unique story. 

Game Features: 
• Unique investigation gameplay that challenges players to be observant 
• Diverse cast of characters 
• Smooth 2D animation that breathes life into the characters 
• Stylized, hand-drawn CG for players to unlock and collect
